meaning: n.加的夫(威尔士之主要海港)
examples: On the day in question we were in Cardiff.
They went straight ahead, then, until they came to the path that led up Cardiff Hill.
The Greens got a rather unhappy surprise when they tried to fly from Cardiff to Lanzarote last weekend.
Cardiff almost went top at the weekend and they are right in the mix.
Ridsdale repeated that he would leave Cardiff when the job he came to do was "completed".
